chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Dislike of Sitting with Judges in Their Gatherings

text: 3225 - وَ رُوِيَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ : "إِنَّ شَرَّ اَلْبِقَاعِ دُورُ اَلْأُمَرَاءِ اَلَّذِينَ لاَ يَقْضُونَ بِالْحَقِّ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3225 - And it has been narrated in another report:
"Indeed, the worst of places are the courts of rulers who do not judge with justice."
